name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.1.0: 9 readback tools — Caption CRUD (list/get/update/delete_caption) + update_all_fields (F9-equivalent SEQ counter recomputation) + Equation CRUD (list/get/update/delete_equation). Built on ooxml-swift 0.10.0 FieldParser + OMMLParser. Closes #17 #19 #21.
